rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` for component implementations
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax for valid AGREE expressions
Scope annex blocks to their owning component declaration
Do not reference AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions; use exposed ports or constants instead
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
Avoid inventing ports/components; only use identifiers visible in the current component scope
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constants
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
Do not reference AADL properties directly in AGREE expressions
